findings.text: Anfal Elbushra signed a tenancy agreement for Castlelaw House, Flat 5, Bedroom B, for the 2025-26 academic year.
A meeting regarding rental arrears was held on 10 April 2026, with a summary sent the same day.
Anfal received an urgent arrears notice from Kathleen Donnelly on 21 April 2026.
Many source dates are extracted from email headers; OCR confidence is moderate. Full chronology requires manual verification of all 68 sources.

summary: Candidate chronology of key events for Anfal Elbushra's Edinburgh Napier accommodation arrears, extracted from 68 source documents. Events span from tenancy signing in August 2025 to arrears meetings in April 2026. Dates are supported by source citations; some dates are approximate due to OCR limitations. Contradictions and uncertainties are flagged.

uncertainties.description: Exact date of tenancy signing not confirmed; inferred from academic year 2025-26.
Several email dates are missing or ambiguous in OCR output; manual review needed.
Full chronology of all 68 sources not extracted due to output cap; only key events included.
